title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Marathon Realty

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Marathon Realty
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Marathon Realty in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Marathon Realty:
Marathon Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marathon Realty!
